data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Product pages are designed for easy and quick navigation and action completion.
data.technical_spec: UI elements like 'Add to Cart' are prominently goal-directed.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified decision-making paths reducing the number of choices per step.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Adoption of industry-standard design conventions to create familiarity.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information chunking is used for better comprehension of product specifications.
data.technical_spec: Bullet point features and concise details.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Attractive design facilitates user engagement and perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Modern design aesthetics with appealing visuals.
